boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Benefits / public casework controls action now? Action: medical transport authorization with stale provider certification. Boundary: appointment note cannot authorize transport by itself.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.

critical_features_preserved: provider certification, service date, and covered service match
final_answer: CTL confirms provider certification, service date, and covered service match current and tied to action. Policy allows execution when source records close boundary exactly. Appointment note does not override. Action may proceed.
